name: io.github.ndjordjevic/pinrag
title: PinRAG
description: MCP RAG: index PDFs, repos, YouTube, Discord, text; optional YouTube vision; query with citations.

environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key — required for default embeddings and default LLM (OpenAI).
environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the Chroma vector store directory (recommended so indexes are not tied to the server process cwd).
environmentVariables.name: PINRAG_PERSIST_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key — required when PINRAG_LLM_PROVIDER=anthropic, for vision enrichment when PINRAG_VISION_PROVIDER=anthropic, or for evaluators using Anthropic.
environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Set true to enable optional YouTube on-screen enrichment (requires pinrag[vision], ffmpeg, and vision API usage). See project README.
environmentVariables.name: PINRAG_YT_VISION_ENABLED
